title: erigeron monticola
intro: Erigeron monticola, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to high-altitude mountainous regions. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat bacterial infections. Erigeron monticola is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Erigeron monticola can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for topical and internal use, with the dried flowers and leaves often being used in combination with other medicinal plants.
